Hero.subtitle: Enterprise-grade crop intelligence, real-time APMC mandi telemetry, and precision predictive modeling built specifically for the next generation of Indian farmers.

Features.heading: Tools for maximum yield.
Features.subheading: Stop guessing. Start harvesting with data-backed confidence using our entire suite of advanced agronomic intelligence tools tailored for Indian agriculture.

cropIntel.title: AI Crop Intelligence
cropIntel.desc: Machine learning models analyze soil health and weather patterns to predict optimal sowing and harvest times.

community.title: Farmer Community

yieldAnalytics.title: Yield Analytics

TrustSection.description: From live APMC market rates and daily SMS alerts to renting heavy machinery locally, KrishiMitra brings the power of digital agriculture directly to your smartphone.

WeatherIntelligence.stableConditions: Conditions are currently stable. No critical action required.

recs.delayIrrigationDesc: High probability of rain expected in the next 48 hours. Postpone scheduled irrigation to prevent waterlogging and nutrient leaching.
recs.irrigationOpenDesc: No significant rain expected soon. Safe to proceed with standard watering cycles to maintain soil moisture.
recs.poorSprayDesc: Current wind speeds ({windSpeed} km/h) are too high. Spraying pesticides now will result in severe chemical drift.
recs.optimalSprayDesc: Low wind and low rain risk today makes it an ideal window for applying foliar fertilizers or pesticides.
recs.fungalRiskDesc: Warm temperatures combined with {humidity}% humidity creates ideal conditions for powdery mildew and rust. Monitor foliage closely.

CommunityForum.sellAlone: Selling Alone (8-10q): High transport cost, zero bargaining power, traders control the price.
CommunityForum.sellTogether: Selling Together (20+ Farmers): Bulk quantity creates trader competition, guaranteeing higher mandi rates.
